gems.title: 真爱留声
gems.summary: 年轻女子给已故姐姐发送的搞笑自白语音留言无意中被转给了陌生人，而这个陌生人竟隔着遥远的距离爱上了她。
gems.summaryEn: A young woman's hilariously confessional voicemails to her late sister are unknowingly redirected to a stranger, who begins to fall in love from afar.
gems.whyWatch: 用错位的声音与孤独的心，拼出一段意想不到的浪漫奇迹。
gems.whyWatchEn: A beautifully quirky romance built on voicemail mishaps, proving love can find you through the most unexpected cracks.
gems.audience: 喜欢非传统浪漫故事、享受缓慢治愈氛围的观众
gems.audienceEn: Audiences who enjoy unconventional love stories and a slow-burn, heartwarming vibe.
